---
title: "PWP Gap Time Cox Model: `r params$target_drug` vs. `r params$comparator_group` — `r params$dep_var`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
params:
  result_file:      ""
  target_drug:      "Semaglutide"
  comparator_group: "Insulins"
  dep_var:          "psych_visits"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
source("helper_functions.R")

load(params$result_file)   # restores pwp_result
r <- pwp_result
```

**Cohort:** `r r$study_cohort_label`
**Outcome:** `r r$dep_var`
**Period:** `r r$period_name` (`r r$bgn_win` to `r r$end_win` days from index)
**Covariates:** `r paste(r$covariates, collapse = ", ")`

---

## Sample Size

```{r sample-size}
r$out %>%
  filter(event_num == 1L) %>%
  count(treatment_name) %>%
  rename(Group = treatment_name, N = n) %>%
  mutate(N = comma(N)) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```

---

## Event Summary

```{r event-summary}
r$out %>%
  filter(status == 1L) %>%
  group_by(treatment_name) %>%
  summarize(
    `Total Events`            = comma(n()),
    `Patients with ≥1 Event`  = comma(n_distinct(PatientDurableKey)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(Group = treatment_name) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```

---

## PWP Cox Model

```{r cox-interpret}
interpret_pwp(r$fit, term = "treatment",
              outcome    = r$dep_var,
              comparison = r$comparator_group)
```

```{r cox-table}
broom::tidy(r$fit, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 3))) %>%
  rename(
    Term       = term,
    HR         = estimate,
    `SE`       = std.error,
    `95% CI Lo`= conf.low,
    `95% CI Hi`= conf.high,
    `Z`        = statistic,
    `P-Value`  = p.value
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```

---

## Time to First Event

```{r km-plot, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
km_data <- r$out %>% filter(event_num == 1L)
km_fit  <- survfit(Surv(gap, status) ~ treatment_name, data = km_data)
km_df   <- broom::tidy(km_fit) %>%
  mutate(strata = gsub("treatment_name=", "", strata))

ggplot(km_df, aes(x = time, y = estimate,
                  color = strata, fill = strata)) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high),
              alpha = 0.12, linetype = 0) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent, limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    title    = r$study_cohort_label,
    subtitle = paste0(r$dep_var, " | ", r$period_name),
    x        = "Days from Index",
    y        = "Event-Free Probability",
    color    = "Group",
    fill     = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16)
```

## Events by Recurrence Number

```{r events-by-num, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
r$out %>%
  filter(status == 1L) %>%
  count(event_num, treatment_name) %>%
  group_by(treatment_name) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(event_num), y = n,
             fill = treatment_name, color = treatment_name)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = comma(n)),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
            vjust = -0.5, colour = "black", size = 4) +
  labs(
    title = r$study_cohort_label,
    x     = "Event Number",
    y     = "Count",
    fill  = "Group",
    color = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16)
```
